case_title: CYNTHIA LEONG VS. STAR REPORTING SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA SUSPEND

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LEONG, CYNTHIA AS TO DEFENDANT STAR REPORTING SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA SUSPEND ED CORPORATION JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEONG, CYNTHIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STAR REPORTING SERVICE, INC., A CALIFORNIA SUSPEND ED CORPORATION $16,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $216.98 INTEREST, $370.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $17,086.98, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
